title: Static Delivery, HTTP Representations, URLs, Bases, and Origins · Runtime Lens: Path Url Separation
summary: Pages work from a local file but break below a project subpath, directories redirect unexpectedly, fragments point nowhere, and the team confuses filesystem paths with URLs. Predict the reader decision, source identity, parse state, output URL, accessibility result, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the path url separation increment in versioned URL and delivery contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-cas…
objectives: Keep platform filesystem paths, POSIX publication paths, percent-encoded URL paths, queries, and fragments as distinct types.
Trace a browser request through URL resolution, origin, path mapping, representation selection, cache, and response metadata.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-worked-static-site-http-url-model-2
# Competency: ssg-worked-static-site-http-url-model-2.
# Case 7417: a project-subpath GitHub Pages deployment.
# Operating constraint: record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, reader task, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: rename a titled source while preserving its public identity and redirect evidence.
def worked_static_site_http_url_model_2(requests: int = 7, mapped_routes: int = 7, base_path: str = "/handbook/", broken_fragments: int = 0, media_types_valid: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "readerworked2",
        "source7417",
        "parse2dekrow",
        "routeworked27417",
        "artifact7417worked2",
        "recovery2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if requests < 1 or mapped_routes < 1:
        return False, mapped_routes, "request-shape"
    if mapped_routes != requests:
        return False, mapped_routes, "route-mapping"
    if not base_path.startswith("/") or not base_path.endswith("/"):
        return False, mapped_routes, "base-path"
    if broken_fragments > 0 or not media_types_valid:
        return False, broken_fragments, "delivery-contract"
    assert mapped_routes == requests
    return True, mapped_routes, "resolved-static-delivery"

# Evidence: ssg-path-url-separation-16vf9o
# Competency: ssg-path-url-separation.
# Case 5450: a large technical reference incremental rebuild.
# Operating constraint: reconcile content, routes, navigation, links, assets, feeds, sitemaps, output files, and artifact digests before approval.

def evidence_ssg_path_url_separation_16vf9o(requests: int = 7, mapped_routes: int = 7, base_path: str = "/handbook/", broken_fragments: int = 0, media_types_valid: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_16vf9o = "16vf9o-o9fv61-5450"
    assert evidence_variant_16vf9o
    evidence_axes_16vf9o = (
        "reader16vf9o",
        "source5450",
        "parseo9fv61",
        "route16vf9o5450",
        "artifact545016vf9o",
        "recoveryo9fv615450",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_16vf9o)) == 6
    if requests < 1 or mapped_routes < 1:
        return False, mapped_routes, "request-shape"
    if mapped_routes != requests:
        return False, mapped_routes, "route-mapping"
    if not base_path.startswith("/") or not base_path.endswith("/"):
        return False, mapped_routes, "base-path"
    if broken_fragments > 0 or not media_types_valid:
        return False, broken_fragments, "delivery-contract"
    assert mapped_routes == requests
    return True, mapped_routes, "resolved-static-delivery"
